title: Investors who think it’s time to move on from the Iran war should look at these numbers
summary: Wall Street shows optimism about potential de-escalation of military operations in the Persian Gulf, though oil markets remain volatile amid uncertainty. This matters because energy market stability significantly impacts global economic growth and inflation concerns.
content: There’s optimism on Wall Street that military operations in the Persian Gulf may be winding down, but oil markets remain on edge.

zh.title: 认为该放弃伊朗战争的投资者应该看看这些数据
zh.summary: 华尔街对波斯湾军事行动可能缓和的前景表示乐观，但在不确定性中油市仍然波动剧烈。这很重要，因为能源市场稳定性对全球经济增长和通胀担忧产生重大影响。

title: Using ChatGPT to order takeout is the future of food
summary: Major restaurant chains like Starbucks and Little Caesars are integrating ChatGPT to streamline ordering and operations, with industry leaders touting AI as a transformative force in food service. The partnerships highlight how large food companies are adopting AI to enhance customer experience and operational efficiency.
content: AI “is the sizzle in the restaurant world,” industry reps say, as Starbucks and Little Caesars partner with ChatGPT.

zh.title: 用ChatGPT点餐是食品行业的未来
zh.summary: 星巴克和小凯撒等主要连锁餐厅正在集成ChatGPT来简化点餐和运营，行业领袖称AI是食品服务业的变革力量。这些合作展示了大型食品公司如何采用AI来增强客户体验和运营效率。

title: This little-known ETF is up over 600% amid U.S.-Iran war, a better trade than oil or energy stocks
summary: The Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) has gained over 600% year-to-date, significantly outpacing traditional energy investments during the U.S.-Iran conflict. The surge reflects increased demand for shipping capacity amid geopolitical tensions affecting global oil trade routes.
content: The Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) has surged more than 600% since the beginning of the year, vastly outperforming crude oil and energy stocks.

zh.title: 这只鲜为人知的ETF在美伊战争中上涨超600%，比石油或能源股更好的交易
zh.summary: Breakwave油轮航运ETF（BWET）年迄今已上涨超600%，在美伊冲突期间明显超过了传统能源投资。这一涨幅反映了地缘政治紧张局势对全球石油贸易路线造成的影响，导致对船舶运力需求增加。

title: My niece, 39, is unhappy and not saving for retirement. How do I approach her?
summary: A family member seeks advice on how to address her 39-year-old niece's lack of retirement savings, following the niece's career exit two years ago due to workplace stress. The situation raises broader questions about financial planning, career transitions, and family financial discussions.
content: “Two years ago, she walked away from what had once been a promising career after a turbulent management change left her overwhelmed.”

zh.title: 我39岁的侄女不开心，也没有为退休存钱。我应该怎样与她谈这个问题？
zh.summary: 一位家庭成员寻求建议，如何与她39岁的侄女讨论退休储蓄不足的问题。两年前，侄女因工作压力而离职。这个情况引发了关于财务规划、职业转变和家庭财务讨论的更广泛问题。

title: Jerome Powell’s final Fed press conference marks an end to an era
summary: Jerome Powell's final Federal Reserve press conference represents a significant shift in Fed communication practices, as incoming chair Kevin Warsh may discontinue the regular media Q&A sessions. This potential change could reduce transparency and alter how monetary policy is communicated to markets and the public.
content: President Trump’s pick for Fed chair, Kevin Warsh, may cancel the regular Q&A with reporters.

zh.title: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔的最后一次美联储新闻发布会标志着一个时代的结束
zh.summary: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔最后一次美联储新闻发布会代表了美联储沟通方式的重大转变，因为即将上任的主席凯文·沃什可能会停止定期的媒体问答环节。这一潜在改变可能会降低透明度，改变货币政策向市场和公众的传达方式。

title: It’s China’s duty-free retail mecca and a tropical oasis, to boot. For Beijing that’s no longer enough.
summary: China's Hainan province, known as a duty-free shopping destination and tourist hub, faces new directives from Beijing that signal the central government wants expanded economic contributions beyond tourism and retail. This reflects Beijing's broader economic priorities and strategic role for the island province.
content: The island province of Hainan has new marching orders.

zh.title: 它是中国的免税零售中心和热带绿洲。但对北京来说，这还远远不够
zh.summary: 中国海南省以免税购物目的地和旅游枢纽著称，但北京新的指令表明中央政府希望该岛省在旅游和零售以外做出更广泛的经济贡献。这反映了北京更广泛的经济优先事项以及对该岛省战略作用的期待。

title: Apple will soon deliver billions more in cash to investors. Here’s how it stacks up to the rest of Big Tech.
summary: Apple is set to return billions to shareholders through capital allocation strategies, with the company and Alphabet demonstrating superior execution in share buyback programs compared to competitors. These buybacks have been particularly effective at boosting earnings per share, a key metric for investor returns.
content: Apple and Alphabet have been most effective at using buybacks to increase earnings per share.

zh.title: 苹果即将向投资者返还数十亿美元。看看它与科技巨头其他公司相比如何。
zh.summary: 苹果准备通过资本分配策略向股东返还数十亿美元,该公司和Alphabet在股票回购计划中相比竞争对手表现出色。这些回购在提高每股收益方面特别有效,这是投资者回报的关键指标。

title: U.S. State Department orders global warning about alleged China AI thefts by DeepSeek, others: Reuters
summary: The U.S. State Department has issued a global warning about alleged intellectual property theft by Chinese AI companies including DeepSeek, citing concerns about security of American AI research. This escalation reflects growing U.S. concerns about technology competition and cybersecurity threats from China.
content: The U.S. is reportedly targeting alleged efforts by Chinese companies to steal intellectual property from American AI labs.

zh.title: 美国国务院下令发布全球警告,涉及DeepSeek等公司涉嫌中国AI知识产权盗窃事件:路透社
zh.summary: 美国国务院发布了全球警告,指控包括DeepSeek在内的中国AI公司涉嫌知识产权盗窃,对美国AI研究的安全表示担忧。这种升级反映了美国对中国技术竞争和网络安全威胁的日益增长的关切。

title: Iran says no meeting with U.S. negotiators planned in Pakistan, with Trump envoys due to head to Islamabad
summary: U.S. special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner are heading to Islamabad for diplomatic engagement, though Iran has stated no direct U.S.-Iran negotiations are scheduled. The visit underscores ongoing diplomatic efforts in the region amid broader geopolitical tensions.
content: U.S. special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner are expected to arrive in Islamabad on Saturday.

zh.title: 伊朗称未计划在巴基斯坦与美国谈判代表会面,特朗普特使即将前往伊斯兰堡
zh.summary: 美国特使史蒂夫·威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳正前往伊斯兰堡进行外交接触,尽管伊朗表示未安排美伊直接谈判。此访强调了在更广泛的地缘政治紧张局势中该地区正在进行的外交努力。

title: England shirt overpriced, says £40k kits collector
summary: A collector with a £40k kit collection argues that classic England shirts offer better value than newly manufactured ones. This highlights concerns about pricing on modern official merchandise.
content: Collector Les Motherby says classic England shirts are often better value than new ones.

zh.title: 英格兰球衣定价过高，4万英镑球衣收藏家发声
zh.summary: 拥有4万英镑球衣收藏的收藏家认为，经典英格兰球衣相比新制造的球衣更具价值。这突显了人们对现代官方球衣商品定价的担忧。

title: Rescue centre facing eviction makes funding appeal
summary: Redhead Rescues Animal Sanctuary in Northamptonshire faces eviction and has launched a funding campaign to purchase its own property. The move would provide long-term security for the animal rescue center.
content: Redhead Rescues Animal Sanctuary in Northamptonshire wants to buy its own land.

zh.title: 动物救援中心面临驱赶，启动筹款活动
zh.summary: 位于北安普顿郡的红头救援动物保护区面临驱赶，已启动筹款活动以购买自己的地产。此举将为该动物救援中心提供长期保障。
